description: Frozen single-gene knockout growth-ratio table for the ADR-017 E. coli oversight firewall. Per anchor gene: quantized growth-ratio-vs-wild-type (u16 permille) on glucose-minimal, aerobic. 1000 permille = wild-type growth, 0 = growth-lethal. The deterministic sim reads ONLY these integers (oracle-fba frozen-table lookup); the offline solver's floats never reach the hash path.
quantization: u16 permille of wild-type growth, floor
provenance: cobrapy single_gene_deletion on BiGG e_coli_core (0.31.1), default medium (glucose-minimal, aerobic). Floats quantized to permille HERE, offline; only the frozen integers ship. Matches curated-from-literature values to +/-0 permille for these 5 anchors.

genes.citation: Orth, Thiele & Palsson, Nat Biotechnol 28:245 (2010); Orth et al., EcoSal Plus (2010). TCA-entry, lethal aerobic on glucose-minimal in e_coli_core.
Feist & Palsson, Nat Biotechnol 26:659 (2008); Orth et al. (2010). Alternate glucose uptake remains; KO neutral in silico.
Sawers & Watson, Mol Microbiol 29:945 (1998); Orth et al. (2010). PFL is anaerobic; aerobic KO neutral.
Wolfe, Microbiol Mol Biol Rev 69:12 (2005); Orth et al. (2010). Acetate-overflow lever; FBA biomass unchanged.
Bunch et al., Microbiology 143:187 (1997); Orth et al. (2010). Fermentative branch; aerobic KO neutral.
